decision-tree.root-question: Is this a critical user journey (signup, login, checkout, payment, smoke-gate) not already covered by unit or integration tests?

branch.question: Are stable data-testid attributes or ARIA roles available on the journey path?
Can test data be seeded and torn down via API (not via UI)?
Can data-testid be added to the frontend within this sprint?

example.trace: critical signup path, data-testids present, /api/test/users available -> run-the-checklist
